creator: marquis@roble.com
text: The proftpd port has a great list of options but "start at boot" is not one of them.  Ideally the Makefile would allow the user to choose between traditional (inetd) and heavily used (rc script) modes.  At least it should check /etc/inetd.conf (and /etc/rc.conf for inetd) before installing an rc script.  Either that or add "start at boot" to the options list.
